title: Soulection White Label: 006
content:
Six white labels in and we're excited to present San Francisco native, Mikos Da Gawd, on this installation. DJ & producer, Mikos pulls inspiration from early 2000's neosoul and energy from his live sets.

The name Mikos Da Gawd is a mixture of humor and power as Da Gawd takes control over your ears with the emotionally driven and sometimes nostalgic samples in his productions.

His White Label is a funky, bouncy, dynamic musical ride laced with familiar soundbytes as well as collaborations with Mr. Carmack and Tele Fresco.
